selections.name: Sturdy
selections.reason: Top class rating of 103. Boasts a strong 104 base speed figure and benefits from the inside post bias on Saratoga's 1 1/8 mile dirt track.

selections.name: Curvino
selections.reason: Tactical early speed style fits the Saratoga track profile perfectly. Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard is a massive upgrade.

selections.name: Mcdiesel
selections.reason: Consistent early speed horse that will look to establish a forward position immediately from the gate.

selections.name: American Grant
selections.reason: Sustained closer style. Will benefit if the top selections engage in a contested early pace duel.

danger_horse.name: Natural Hunk
danger_horse.reason: Capable of hitting the board if he can replicate his winning effort from three starts back.

selections.name: Waitin'onapromise
selections.reason: Elite turf pedigree with a massive 116 base speed figure. Jose Ortiz takes the mount for a high-percentage connection.

selections.name: Ticket To Ride
selections.reason: Classy runner coming off a strong performance on grass. Outside post historically performs well on the outer turf course.

selections.name: Forever To Go
selections.reason: Tactical presser style. Should get a clean trip tracking the early leaders under Carmouche.

selections.name: Raynham Hall
selections.reason: Consistent turf performer with solid late-pace figures. Fits well in this field.

danger_horse.reason: Flashed high potential in debut and could take a major step forward second time out.

selections.name: Mr R T
